title: Circular
body:
Circular is a mod for Forge 1.18.1+ that makes the player inventory, well, circular. It replaces the normal inventory, with your character in the middle, the armor around you, your hotbar after that, and the inventory slots after that. In 1.19 you might even find a little secret
![](https://i.imgur.com/jeZPPvb.png)
